CustomField.description: When enabled, custom fields on Relationship records are automatically synchronized between the two reciprocal Relationship records in a pair. Field mappings are defined in Relationship Field Sync custom metadata. Disabled by default. Enable if you have custom fields on the Relationship object that should stay in sync between reciprocal records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Sync custom fields between reciprocal Relationship records. Configure field mappings in Relationship Field Sync metadata.
CustomField.label: Enable Custom Field Sync
